ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c ,'Non-Payment'), OR( NOT(Amount__c > 0), ISBLANK( Opportunity__c ), Booking__r.Opportunity__r.Id <> Opportunity__r.Id, Booking__r.RecordType.Name <> 'Booking', Account_Name__c <> Booking__r.Account_Name__c, Impacts_Commission__c <> TRUE ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 1)Amount,Opportunity and it's related Original Booking are required 2)ImpactsCommission should be checked 3)AccountName should be Account of Booking for CCR type "Non-Payment"
